class.name: CSV
class.brief_description: Resource containing delimiter-separated values parsed as dictionaries.
class.description: CSV stores rows parsed from CSV, TSV, PSV, or other delimiter-separated text. When [member headers] is enabled, the first row is used as dictionary keys. Otherwise rows are stored with numeric column indexes.

method.name: convert_to_variant
method.description: Converts a field string to a Variant using the same conversion rules as [method CSVImporter.parse_record].

method.name: get_parser_options
method.description: Returns the parser options generated from this resource's parser properties. The dictionary can be passed to [method DSVImporter.import_string], [method CSVImporter.import_string], or [method CSVImporter.parse_record].

method.name: load_file
method.description: Loads delimiter-separated data from [param path] into [member rows].

method.name: load_string
method.description: Loads delimiter-separated data from [param string] into [member rows].

members.member: Lines whose first parsed field begins with any of these prefixes are skipped while loading.
The one-character delimiter used while loading and saving.
Field values that [method convert_to_variant] and CSV importer methods convert to [code]false[/code].
If [code]true[/code], the first parsed row is used as dictionary keys.
Field values that [method convert_to_variant] and CSV importer methods convert to [code]null[/code].
Controls how rows with fewer or more fields than the first accepted row are handled. See [enum RowLengthMode].
If [code]true[/code], rows containing only empty fields are skipped while loading.
If [code]true[/code], leading and trailing whitespace is removed from unquoted fields while loading.
Field values that [method convert_to_variant] and CSV importer methods convert to [code]true[/code].

constants.constant: Rejects input when any accepted row has a different field count than the first accepted row.
Pads short rows with empty fields and rejects rows that have too many fields.
Pads short rows with empty fields and truncates rows that have too many fields.
Allows rows to keep their original field counts.
